about: This file records WHY the commit carrying `Concausal-Fixes: f2ec194868e0bdc81652b197b42ff96f82815422b55027cd5a6f5b1c38b4418a` was made: the job and step that failed and the resolved input versions it ran with (the conditions of the failure, not its cause). coordinate_id = sha256 over {pipeline_id, job, failed_step, sorted inputs}.
